title: campanula glomerata var. stenosiphon
intro: Campanula glomerata var. stenosiphon, also known as the clustered bellflower or stenosiphon bellflower, is a variety of flowering plant in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Campanula glomerata var. stenosiphon include its potential to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and calm digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory and immune system health.
